name: bigvalue-realestate
description: Build residential real-estate services on BigValue Data Marketplace: codegen skill for complex search, map markers, price panels, and dong/ho drilldown.

interface.longDescription: Guides AI code generators through BigValue Data Marketplace residential products: complex search, map markers, detail panels, price tabs, building/unit drilldown, and safe server-side API integration. MCP connection is configured separately during onboarding.
